title: Leymus ugamicus
taxonomy: Leymus ugamicus is a species of grass within the genus Leymus, which is a group of grasses in the family Poaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Pooideae, which includes many cool-season grasses. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of monocots, often referred to as true grasses. The order Poales is a division of flowering plants that includes the grasses and their relatives, such as the sedges and rushes. Leymus ugamicus is therefore classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
